arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes telling Pep Guardiola prediction ahead of crunch Man City test
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot will not be taking anything for granted when they face Manchester City this weekend despite the Premier League champions' recent poor form

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta fires Liverpool warning as Arsenal boss plots title resurgence
arts.sum: Arsenal remain nine points and three places adrift of Liverpool after just 12 games but Mikel Arteta believes that their Premier League title hopes are still well and truly alive

arts.ttl: 'I won't run away': Pep Guardiola vows to keep fighting to halt Man City's sharp decline ahead of vital clash against leaders Liverpool
arts.sum: City, who have lost five of their last six games, would fall 11 points behind leaders Liverpool if they lost at Anfield tomorrow and Guardiola suggested that gap would be insurmountable.

arts.ttl: The influence and inspiration at heart of Arne Slot and Pep Guardiola’s new rivalry
arts.sum: After almost a decade of Jurgen Klopp and Guardiola’s clashes on the touchline, Liverpool and Manchester City’s rivalry takes a new form at Anfield

arts.ttl: Arteta warns Liverpool: Your form will be difficult to sustain
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has warned Liverpool that their lead at the top of the Premier League will be "extremely difficult" to sustain - and believes his side can make up the nine-point gap to the leaders.

arts.ttl: Modest Slot eyes more Manchester City woe but admits Guardiola influence
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach ‘could hardly believe’ City’s latest capitulation as he prepares to add to their misery on Sunday Arne Slot had an extensive to-do list on Tuesday. It included overseeing Liverpool’s final full training session before beating Real Madrid for the first time in 15 years, conducting the pre-match press conference, several interviews and getting the shopping on the way home. His wife and two children were arriving from the Netherlands that day for a short visit. Best make the place look presentable and the fridge full. Jobs done, it was time to watch his previous club torment Sunday’s opponents. “What made this game special for me was sitting at home, putting the volume up and hearing the Feyenoord fans singing my name,” said Slot of his former team’s remarkable Champions League comeback against Manchester City. “That’s the biggest compliment you can get if you leave a club: that the fans still like you.” Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Guardiola will not 'run away' from Man City problems
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola says he has no plans to "run away" from the difficult time his team are facing. City travel to Liverpool on Sunday, trailing the Premier League leaders by eight points.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid CONFIRM Trent Alexander-Arnold plan
arts.sum: Real Madrid have reportedly informed Liverpool of their plan to sign Trent Alexander-Arnold on a free transfer next summer. Although Real Madrid have stated their desire to sign Alexander-Arnold, former Liverpool defender Jamie Carragher believes the England international will choose to extend his contract at Anfield rather than secure a move to Spain.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane 'decision made' by Sky Sports for Liverpool vs Manchester City after furious Ipswich fan exchange
arts.sum: Roy Keane was involved in a heated confrontation with Ipswich Town supporters during last weekend's coverage of the FA Cup

arts.ttl: 'I remember speaking to Arsene': Keown makes PL title race prediction as Man City now playing catch-up to Liverpool
arts.sum: An exciting Premier League title race is shaping up with a resurgent Liverpool topping the table ahead of the likes of Manchester City, Chelsea, Arsenal...
